overview.description: The Schwab US Aggregate Bond ETF (SCHZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Aggregate index. The fund tracks a broad index of U.S. investment grade fixed income securities, including corporate, government, and mortgage-backed securities. SCHZ was launched on Jul 14, 2011 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

data.title: Investors are rushing to buy TIPS ETFs to beat inflation. They could end up losing.
